overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a psychological horror game showing a character exploring a foggy suburban garden with a white wooden house, vine-covered arbors, and surreal elements. The character walks through dense foliage, a gazebo, and discovers a fountain with an unusual statue before returning to the house.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered patio of white wooden house

agents.ego_description: walking across wet brick patio toward garden archway entrance

entered.detail: two-story white wooden house with green trim and multiple windows
white wooden lattice pergola covered with hanging vines
large blooming hydrangea bushes with white and pink flowers
white metal outdoor table and chairs on brick patio

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a wet brick patio beside a white wooden house, beginning to walk toward a vine-covered garden archway. The area is shrouded in thick fog with a wooden pergola overhead and blooming hydrangea bushes lining the path.

events.description: enters covered vine tunnel from open patio area

agents.ego_description: walking through dense vine-covered arbor tunnel with wooden lattice sides

entered.detail: tunnel-like walkway covered with dense green ivy and vines overhead
gravel walkway surface beneath the arbor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow tunnel completely covered in dense vines and ivy, blocking the sky. The wooden lattice sides are visible through the foliage as the character walks along the gravel path, with the house now visible only as a faint shape behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: octagonal wooden gazebo with lattice walls

events.description: exits vine tunnel and enters wooden gazebo structure

agents.ego_description: walking through hexagonal gazebo with wooden benches and lattice walls

entered.detail: hexagonal wooden structure with open doorway and overhead beams
white wooden lattice panels forming gazebo walls

segments.scene_description: Exiting the vine tunnel, the character enters a wooden gazebo with lattice walls and built-in benches. The structure provides partial shelter while allowing diffused light through the lattice, creating a transition space before the open garden.

scene_state.functional_zone: open garden path with hydrangea borders approaching iron fence

events.description: exits gazebo into open foggy garden with view of distant buildings and fence line

agents.ego_description: walking along gravel path through dense garden foliage toward fence line and foggy town view

entered.detail: tall iron fence with stone pillars marking garden boundary
distant buildings barely visible through thick fog beyond the fence
ornate black metal street lamp with glass enclosure

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into an open garden path lined with dense hydrangea bushes on both sides, walking toward an iron fence that marks the property boundary. Through the thick fog, distant buildings of a town are barely visible, and a vintage lamppost stands to the right of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular fountain with surreal statue in garden center

events.description: approaches stone fountain containing mannequin-like statue making peace sign

agents.ego_description: approaching and observing the surreal fountain statue with raised hand gesture

entered.detail: circular stone fountain basin with central pedestal
mannequin-like figure in fountain making V-sign gesture with right hand
white house visible through fog in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character discovers a circular stone fountain in the garden center containing a surreal mannequin-like statue making a peace sign with its hand. The white house is visible again through the fog to the right as the character stops to observe the unusual sculpture.

scene_state.functional_zone: return to house patio with green awning

events.description: turns away from fountain and walks back toward house along garden path
looks up at upper floors and balconies of the house

agents.ego_description: walking back toward house patio along garden path, then looking up at building facade and balconies

entered.detail: green canvas awning over patio door
arched trellis covered with vines marking patio entrance

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the fountain and walks back toward the house, passing under a vine-covered archway onto the brick patio. The camera looks up at the house's upper floors, balconies, and green awnings as the exploration loop completes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a domestic patio through a claustrophobic botanical tunnel and into a surreal garden before returning to the house. It begins on a wet brick patio beside a white wooden house, moving past blooming hydrangeas and under a pergola toward a vine-covered archway. As the camera enters a narrow tunnel of dense ivy and lattice, the sky vanishes and the house fades into a faint shape, before the path opens into a wooden gazebo with diffused light filtering through its walls. The scene then expands into an open garden lined with hydrangeas and a vintage lamppost, leading toward a circular stone fountain featuring a surreal mannequin statue making a peace sign. Finally, the camera turns away from the sculpture and retreats through the greenery back to the brick patio, tilting upward to reveal the house's balconies and green awnings.
